interpretation_boundary.model_output: segmentation or risk-related numeric output from a domain model
interpretation_boundary.aos_decision: PASS/WARN/BLOCK control decision over output metadata or uncertainty
interpretation_boundary.human_decision: radiologist or workflow-owner review outside this repository

current_public_evidence_status.radiology_metrics_publication_status: not published as current public evidence
current_public_evidence_status.reference_profile_results: not available in current public evidence
current_public_evidence_status.reason: Radiology is kept as a reference profile only. Domain-specific metric publication requires a separate evidence review.
current_public_evidence_status.publication_policy: Do not publish stale or unproven domain-performance numbers as current results.

historical_artifacts.publication_note: Historical aggregate values are intentionally omitted from the current public evidence layer to avoid stale result claims.

performance_and_evaluation.additional_evaluation_status: not published as current public evidence
performance_and_evaluation.additional_performance_status: not available in current public evidence
performance_and_evaluation.public_latency_or_throughput_benchmarks: not available in current public evidence

kernel_positioning.summary: one domain-agnostic AOS control kernel can support many specialist profiles
kernel_positioning.public_boundary: not a clinical validation, production readiness, regulatory compliance, SOTA, or safety-certification claim
